subject: [RFC PATCH 18/45] mm: page_alloc: superpageblock-aware contiguous and higher order allocation

2026-04-30.patch_summary: This patch introduces superpageblock-aware contiguous page allocation, which leverages SPB metadata to find clean (all-free) superpageblocks and allocate large contiguous pages more efficiently. It adds a new field to the superpageblock structure to track fully-covered allocations and updates the iteration logic to handle non-aligned allocation boundaries. The patch also hooks this new allocation method into the existing compaction code for THP/mTHP and high-order unmovable/reclaimable allocations, and tries sb_try_alloc_contig() first for movable allocations at pageblock_order or above.
